<type>file</type>
<content>
1: # Claude Code 与 OpenCode trae-plugin插件架构解析
2: 
3: ## 目录
4: 
5: 1. [两大平台的定位差异](#1-两大平台的定位差异)
6: 2. [插件发现与注册机制](#2-插件发现与注册机制)
7: 3. [命令系统：Slash Commands vs Bun Tools](#3-命令系统slash-commands-vs-bun-tools)
8: 4. [工具协议：MCP (JSON Schema) vs Bun Tool (Zod + TypeScript)](#4-工具协议mcp-json-schema-vs-bun-tool-zod--typescript)
9: 5. [生命周期钩子：hooks.json vs Plugin Event System](#5-生命周期钩子hooksjson-vs-plugin-event-system)
10: 6. [命令文档：用户帮助 vs Agent 上下文](#6-命令文档用户帮助-vs-agent-上下文)
11: 7. [安全模型：allowed-tools vs 无显式权限声明](#7-安全模型allowed-tools-vs-无显式权限声明)
12: 8. [运行时与进程模型](#8-运行时与进程模型)
13: 9. [本项目的统一架构设计](#9-本项目的统一架构设计)
14: 10. [完整对比矩阵](#10-完整对比矩阵)
15: 
16: ---
17: 
18: ## 1. 两大平台的定位差异
19: 
20: ### Claude Code：AI 辅助编程终端
21: 
22: Claude Code 是 Anthropic 的命令行 AI 编程工具，采用 **插件 + Skill + Agent + Hook + MCP** 多维扩展体系。其核心特征：
23: 
24: - **用户交互界面是 TUI**（终端用户界面），用户通过 `/` 开头的斜杠命令触发功能
25: - **AI 自主调用**通过 MCP（Model Context Protocol）协议实现
26: - **Skill 系统**为 AI 提供可自动匹配的上下文注入能力
27: - 所有扩展组件通过 **文件发现**（约定目录结构）自动加载
28: 
29: ### OpenCode：AI 编程框架
30: 
31: OpenCode 是基于 Bun 运行的 AI 编程框架，采用 **Plugin（TypeScript 模块）** 扩展体系。其核心特征：
32: 
33: - **Plugin 是纯 TypeScript 模块**，`export` 标准接口（Plugin、Tool、Hook）
34: - 通过 `@opencode-ai/plugin` SDK 提供类型安全的工厂函数（`tool()`）
35: - **Plugin 工厂函数本质是类型包装器** — `tool()` 内部直接返回输入对象（passthrough）
36: - **所有能力统一在一个 Plugin 模块**中（tools、hooks、auth、provider、chat.* 等）
37: - 工具发现通过 **Bun 自动扫描** `.opencode/tools/*.ts` 的 `export default tool(...)`
38: 
39: ---
40: 
41: ## 2. 插件发现与注册机制
42: 
43: ### Claude Code：声明式文件发现
44: 
45: ```
46: my-plugin/
47: ├── .claude-plugin/plugin.json    ← 插件清单（必需）
48: ├── commands/*.md                 ← Slash Commands（文件即命令）
49: ├── .mcp.json                     ← MCP 工具注册
50: ├── hooks/hooks.json              ← 生命周期钩子
51: ├── skills/                       ← AI Skills
52: ├── agents/                       ← 自定义 Agent
53: ├── .lsp.json                     ← LSP 服务器配置
54: ├── monitors/monitors.json        ← 后台监控
55: ├── bin/                          ← PATH 扩展
56: └── settings.json                 ← 默认设置
57: ```
58: 
59: **核心机制**：
60: - `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` 定义插件身份（name、description、version）— 仅此文件在 `.claude-plugin/` 下
61: - 所有其他目录位于 **插件根级别**
62: - Claude Code 扫描目录结构，根据文件名和目录约定自动注册
63: - 技能名被 `name` 字段命名空间化（如 `/my-plugin:hello`）
64: - Marketplace 安装时以 git URL 或本地路径为源
65: 
66: **plugin.json 格式**：
67: ```json
68: {
69:   "name": "trae",
70:   "description": "在 Claude Code 中直接调用字节 Trae Agent (trae-cli) 做代码审查或任务委托",
71:   "version": "1.0.0",
72:   "author": { "name": "wangxumarshall" },
73:   "repository": "https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc"
74: }
75: ```
76: 
77: ### OpenCode：命令式 TypeScript 模块
78: 
79: ```
80: .opencode/
81: ├── tools/trae-*.ts           ← Bun 工具 (export default tool({...}))
82: ├── commands/trae-*.md        ← 命令描述 (YAML frontmatter + Markdown)
83: ├── plugins/trae-hooks.ts    ← 生命周期插件 (export const X: Plugin)
84: └── package.json              ← 依赖 (@opencode-ai/plugin)
85: ```
86: 
87: **核心机制**：
88: - 无独立 `plugin.json` — 插件身份由 TypeScript 模块的 `export` 名称决定
89: - `@opencode-ai/plugin` SDK 提供类型工厂：
90: 
91: ```typescript
92: // @opencode-ai/plugin/dist/tool.d.ts
93: export type ToolResult = string | {
94:     output: string;
95:     metadata?: Record<string, any>;
96: };
97: 
98: export declare function tool<Args extends z.ZodRawShape>(input: {
99:     description: string;
100:     args: Args;
101:     execute(args: z.infer<z.ZodObject<Args>>, context: ToolContext): Promise<ToolResult>;
102: }): { description: string; args: Args; execute(...): Promise<ToolResult> };
103: ```
104: 
105: - `tool()` 内部是 **纯 passthrough**（直接返回输入对象），真正的注册由 OpenCode 主机完成
106: - 框架扫描 `.opencode/tools/*.ts` 的默认导出，根据文件名派生工具名（`trae-run.ts` → `trae-run`）
107: 
108: **Plugin 类型**：
109: ```typescript
110: export type PluginInput = {
111:     client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>;
112:     project: Project;
113:     directory: string;
114:     worktree: string;
115:     experimental_workspace: { register(type: string, adaptor: WorkspaceAdaptor): void };
116:     serverUrl: URL;
117:     $: BunShell;
118: };
119: 
120: export type Plugin = (input: PluginInput, options?: PluginOptions) => Promise<Hooks>;
121: 
122: export interface Hooks {
123:     event?: (input: { event: Event }) => Promise<void>;
124:     config?: (input: Config) => Promise<void>;
125:     tool?: { [key: string]: ToolDefinition };
126:     auth?: AuthHook;
127:     provider?: ProviderHook;
128:     "chat.message"?: (...) => Promise<void>;
129:     "chat.params"?: (...) => Promise<void>;
130:     "tool.execute.before"?: (...) => Promise<void>;
131:     "tool.execute.after"?: (...) => Promise<void>;
132:     "permission.ask"?: (...) => Promise<void>;
133:     // ... 20+ hook types
134: }
135: ```
136: 
137: **关键差异**：
138: 
139: | 维度 | Claude Code | OpenCode |
140: |------|-------------|----------|
141: | 插件入口 | `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`（声明式） | TypeScript 模块的 `export const X: Plugin`（命令式） |
142: | 发现机制 | 扫描目录结构 → 约定命名 → 自动注册 | 扫描 `tools/*.ts` 默认导出 → 文件名派生工具名 |
143: | 命名空间 | `plugin.json.name` 前缀（`/trae:run`） | 文件名前缀（`trae-run`） |
144: | Marketplace | git URL 或本地路径，`strict: true` 模式 | 无 marketplace 概念，本地扫描 |
145: | 依赖管理 | 根 `package.json`（Node.js） | `.opencode/package.json`（Bun 独立依赖树） |
146: 
147: ---
148: 
149: ## 3. 命令系统：Slash Commands vs Bun Tools
150: 
151: ### Claude Code：Slash Commands（用户交互式）
152: 
153: Claude Code 的 `commands/*.md` 文件定义**用户手动触发**的斜杠命令：
154: 
155: ```markdown
156: ---
157: description: 将任务委托给 Trae Agent 执行
158: allowed-tools: Bash(trae-cli:*)
159: ---
160: 
161: # /trae:run
162: 
163: **Description:** 将任务描述直接交给 Trae Agent...
164: **Usage:** /trae:run "自然语言任务描述" [options]
165: **Options:** --background, --json, --yolo, ...
166: **Examples:** ...
167: **Internal Execution:**
168: node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" run "任务描述" [options]
169: ```
170: 
171: **执行流程**：
172: 1. 用户输入 `/trae:run "重构"` → Claude Code 识别 slash command
173: 2. Claude Code 读取 `.md` 文件 → 知道该执行什么
174: 3. Claude 的 **Bash 工具**运行 `node dist/index.js run "重构"`
175: 4. `allowed-tools: Bash(trae-cli:*)` 告诉 Claude Code 该命令需要 `Bash` 工具权限
176: 
177: **关键特性**：
178: - **用户交互** — 用户主动输入 `/trae:xxx`
179: - **AI 自主调用的分离实现** — 通过 `.mcp.json`（见下文）
180: - **权限声明** — `allowed-tools` 指定所需的 Bash 工具范围
181: 
182: ### OpenCode：Bun Tools（Agent 调用式）
183: 
184: ```typescript
185: // .opencode/tools/trae-run.ts
186: import { tool } from "@opencode-ai/plugin"
187: 
188: export default tool({
189:   description: "使用 Trae Agent 执行任意自然语言任务...",
190:   args: {
191:     prompt: tool.schema.string().describe("任务描述"),
192:     yolo: tool.schema.boolean().optional().describe("YOLO 模式..."),
193:     // ...
194:   },
195:   async execute(args, context) {
196:     const { $ } = await import("bun")
197:     const cliArgs: string[] = ["node", DIST_INDEX, "run"]
198:     cliArgs.push(args.prompt)
199:     if (args.yolo) cliArgs.push("--yolo")
200:     // ...
201:     const result = await $`${cliArgs}`.cwd(PLUGIN_DIR)
202:     return { text: result.stdout }
203:   },
204: })
205: ```
206: 
207: **执行流程**：
208: 1. OpenCode Agent 决定调用工具 → 选择 `trae-run`
209: 2. OpenCode 验证参数 against Zod schema
210: 3. 直接调用 `execute(args, context)` — **函数调用，非子进程**
211: 4. `execute()` 内部通过 Bun `$` 壳命令 `spawn` 子进程
212: 
213: **关键特性**：
214: - **Agent 自主调用** — Agent 在 Tool Context 中决策是否调用
215: - **TypeScript 函数调用** — 不是 Bash 工具运行，而是直接函数执行
216: - **Rich Context** — `context` 提供 `sessionID`, `directory`, `worktree`, `abort` 等
217: 
218: ### 两者本质差异
219: 
220: | 维度 | Claude Code Slash Command | OpenCode Bun Tool |
221: |------|--------------------------|-------------------|
222: | 触发者 | 用户（输入 `/trae:xxx`） | AI Agent（在 Tool Context 中决策） |
223: | 执行方式 | Claude 的 Bash 工具运行 `node dist/index.js` | 直接在插件进程中调用 `execute()` 函数 |
224: | 进程层级 | 3 层：Claude → Bash → node dist/index.js | 2 层：OpenCode → execute() → node dist/index.js |
225: | 安全性 | 基于 `allowed-tools` 的 Bash 权限控制 | 基于 Bun 运行时，在 OpenCode 的 Plugin 沙箱内 |
226: | 类型安全 | 无 — Markdown 文件，Claude AI 解析 | 完整 — TypeScript 类型推断 + Zod 运行时校验 |
227: | 用户可见性 | 在 `/help` 面板显示 | 在 `/` 工具面板展示（由 TUI 自动列出） |
228: 
229: **重要事实**：OpenCode 没有独立的"Slash Command"概念。所有工具都在同一面板中暴露，`/trae:xxx` 的 `/` 前缀是 **OpenCode TUI 的统一入口约定**，与 Claude Code 的 slash command 是不同概念。OpenCode 把 `tools/` 下所有工具都列在 `/` 面板，`trae-` 前缀只是文件名派生的。
230: 
231: ---
232: 
233: ## 4. 工具协议：MCP (JSON Schema) vs Bun Tool (Zod + TypeScript)
234: 
235: ### Claude Code：MCP 工具（声明式 JSON Schema）
236: 
237: ```json
238: // .mcp.json
239: {
240:   "tools": [
241:     {
242:       "name": "trae_run",
243:       "description": "使用 Trae Agent 执行任意自然语言任务...",
244:       "parameters": {
245:         "type": "object",
246:         "properties": {
247:           "prompt":         { "type": "string", "description": "任务描述" },
248:           "yolo":           { "type": "boolean", "description": "YOLO 模式..." },
249:           "allowed_tools":  { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
250:           "background":     { "type": "boolean", "description": "后台执行" },
251:           // ...
252:         },
253:         "required": ["prompt"]
254:       }
255:     }
256:   ]
257: }
258: ```
259: 
260: **MCP 执行模型**：
261: ```
262: Claude LLM → 决定调用 "trae_run" → 发送 MCP 请求
263:   → Claude Code MCP Client → spawn("node", ["dist/index.js", "run", "--prompt", "重构"])
264:   → 捕获 stdout → 返回给 Claude
265: ```
266: 
267: MCP 协议中，**工具定义和执行分离**：`.mcp.json` 只描述接口，执行由 Claude Code 的 MCP 服务器托管。 Claude Code 将 JSON 参数转换为 CLI 标志，调用子进程，捕获输出。
268: 
269: ### OpenCode：Bun Tool（Zod + TypeScript 函数）
270: 
271: ```typescript
272: export default tool({
273:   description: "使用 Trae Agent 执行任意自然语言任务...",
274:   args: {
275:     prompt: tool.schema.string().describe("任务描述"),
276:     yolo: tool.schema.boolean().optional().describe("YOLO 模式..."),
277:     allowed_tools: tool.schema.array(tool.schema.string()).optional(),
278:     background: tool.schema.boolean().optional(),
279:     // ...
280:   },
281:   async execute(args, context) {
282:     const { $ } = await import("bun")
283:     // 手动构建 CLI 参数
284:     const cliArgs = ["node", DIST_INDEX, "run"]
285:     cliArgs.push(args.prompt)
286:     if (args.yolo) cliArgs.push("--yolo")
287:     // ...
288:     const result = await $`${cliArgs}`.cwd(PLUGIN_DIR)
289:     return { text: result.stdout }
290:   },
291: })
292: ```
293: 
294: **Bun Tool 执行模型**：
295: ```
296: OpenCode LLM → 决定调用 "trae-run" → OpenCode 验证 args (Zod)
297:   → execute(args, context) → $`node dist/index.js run` (Bun shell)
298:   → 返回 { text: stdout }
299: ```
300: 
301: **对比**：
302: 
303: | 维度 | MCP JSON Schema | Bun Tool Zod |
304: |------|----------------|-------------|
305: | 参数定义 | `{"type": "string"}` | `tool.schema.string()` |
306: | 类型推断 | 无 — 纯 JSON | 完整 — `z.infer<Args>` |
307: | 运行时校验 | Claude Code 框架做 | Zod 校验，失败抛异常 |
308: | IDE 支持 | 无 | 自动补全、悬停文档、类型错误 |
309: | 执行委托 | ✅ 框架管理子进程 | ❌ 自己写 `execute()` 逻辑 |
310: | 上下文信息 | 无 | `context: ToolContext`（session, dir, abort...） |
311: | 返回值类型 | 隐式 stdout（纯文本） | `{ output: string; metadata?: Record }` |
312: 
313: **关键差异**：MCP 工具是**契约式**的——只声明接口，执行全部委托给框架。Bun Tool 是**实现式**的——每个工具定义自己的执行逻辑和进程管理。
314: 
315: ---
316: 
317: ## 5. 生命周期钩子：hooks.json vs Plugin Event System
318: 
319: ### Claude Code：声明式 hooks.json
320: 
321: ```json
322: // hooks/hooks.json
323: {
324:   "hooks": {
325:     "SessionStart": [
326:       {
327:         "matcher": "startup",
328:         "hooks": [{
329:           "type": "command",
330:           "command": "node \"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/session-lifecycle-hook.mjs\" SessionStart",
331:           "timeout": 10
332:         }]
333:       }
334:     ],
335:     "Stop": [
336:       {
337:         "hooks": [{
338:           "type": "command",
339:           "command": "node \"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/stop-review-gate-hook.mjs\"",
340:           "timeout": 60
341:         }]
342:       }
343:     ],
344:     "PostToolUse": [
345:       {
346:         "matcher": ".*trae:review.*",
347:         "hooks": [{
348:           "type": "command",
349:           "command": "node \"...\" PostReview",
350:           "timeout": 5
351:         }]
352:       }
353:     ]
354:   }
355: }
356: ```
357: 
358: **钩子脚本实现** (`session-lifecycle-hook.mjs`):
359: ```javascript
360: async function sessionStart() {
361:   const installed = checkTraeCliInstalled();
362:   const hasConfig = checkTraeConfig();
363:   const running = getRunningJobs();
364:   // 输出状态到 console → 被 Claude 捕获为上下文
365: }
366: 
367: async function sessionEnd() {
368:   cleanupStaleLogs();
369:   const running = getRunningJobs();
370:   // 提醒后台任务 + 清理
371: }
372: 
373: async function postReview() {
374:   // 记录审查执行到 reviews.jsonl
375: }
376: ```
377: 
378: **Stop 钩子** (`stop-review-gate-hook.mjs`):
379: ```javascript
380: async function stopGate() {
381:   const hasChanges = hasUncommittedChanges(); // git diff
382:   const runningJobs = getRunningJobs();
383:   // 有变更或运行中任务 → process.exit(1) 拦截停止
384: }
385: ```
386: 
387: | 特性 | hooks.json 定义 |
388: |------|----------------|
389: | 可用钩子 | `SessionStart`、`SessionEnd`、`Stop`、`PostToolUse` |
390: | 匹配器 | `"startup"` 关键字 / 正则字符串 / 无（匹配所有） |
391: | 执行方式 | 框架 spawn 子进程 (`command` 字符串) |
392: | 超时控制 | 声明式 `timeout: 10`（秒，框架强制 kill） |
393: | 数据传输 | 无 stdin 输入（隐式环境变量） |
394: | 变量替换 | `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}`（框架替换） |
395: 
396: ### OpenCode：命令式 Plugin Event Handler
397: 
398: ```typescript
399: // .opencode/plugins/trae-hooks.ts
400: export const TraeHooksPlugin: Plugin = async ({ directory }) => {
401:   let currentSessionID: string | null = null
402: 
403:   return {
404:     event: async ({ event }) => {
405:       switch (event.type) {
406:         case "session.created":
407:           // SessionStart
408:           const session = event.properties?.info
409:           currentSessionID = session.id
410:           await callHook("session-lifecycle-hook.mjs", "SessionStart", directory, {
411:             session_id: session.id,  // 通过 JSON stdin 传递
412:           })
413:           break
414: 
415:         case "session.deleted":
416:           // SessionEnd
417:           callHookSync("session-lifecycle-hook.mjs", "SessionEnd", directory, {
418:             session_id: session.id,
419:           })
420:           currentSessionID = null
421:           break
422: 
423:         case "server.instance.disposed":
424:           // SessionEnd 兜底（服务器退出而非显式删除会话）
425:           if (currentSessionID) {
426:             callHookSync("session-lifecycle-hook.mjs", "SessionEnd", directory, {
427:               session_id: currentSessionID,
428:             })
429:             currentSessionID = null
430:           }
431:       }
432:     },
433:   }
434: }
435: ```
436: 
437: **`callHook` / `callHookSync` 实现**：
438: ```typescript
439: async function callHook(script: string, hookType: string, cwd: string, payload?: Record) {
440:   const proc = Bun.spawn(["node", SCRIPT_DIR, script, hookType], {
441:     cwd,
442:     stdin: payload ? new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload) + "\n"]) : undefined,
443:   })
444:   // 捕获 stdout/stderr
445:   await proc.exited
446: }
447: ```
448: 
449: | 特性 | OpenCode Plugin Events |
450: |------|----------------------|
451: | 可用事件 | 36+ 种（EventSessionCreated, EventSessionDeleted, ...） |
452: | 实际使用的 | `session.created` → SessionStart, `session.deleted` / `server.instance.disposed` → SessionEnd |
453: | 未映射的 | `Stop`（停止门控）、`PostToolUse`（审查记录） |
454: | 匹配方式 | 代码中 `switch (event.type)` |
455: | 执行方式 | `Bun.spawn()` / `Bun.spawnSync()` |
456: | 数据传输 | JSON 对象通过 stdin 传递 |
457: | 状态保持 | 闭包变量 `currentSessionID` |
458: | 异步支持 | `callHook` (async) / `callHookSync` (sync) |
459: | 错误处理 | `try/catch` 静默吞错（"plugin must not crash OpenCode"） |
460: 
461: **映射关系**：
462: 
463: ```
464: Claude Code                     OpenCode
465: ────────────                    ────────
466: SessionStart (startup)    ←→    session.created (+ payload via stdin)
467: SessionEnd                ←→    session.deleted / server.instance.disposed
468: Stop (gate)                     ❌ 未实现（无等价事件钩子）
469: PostToolUse (.trae:review.)     ❌ 未实现（可用 tool.execute.after 但需过滤）
470: ```
471: 
472: **差异根因**：
473: - Claude Code 的 `Stop` 钩子绑定到用户停止操作——这是 TUI 层面的事件，OpenCode 的 Event 类型中无对应
474: - Claude Code 的 `PostToolUse` 通过正则匹配工具名（`.trae:review.`）——OpenCode 的 `tool.execute.after` 钩子可用于相同目的，但本项目未实现过滤
475: 
476: ---
477: 
478: ## 6. 命令文档：用户帮助 vs Agent 上下文
479: 
480: ### Claude Code 命令文档
481: 
482: `commands/*.md` 为 **Slash Command 的完整规范**，同时服务两个受众：
483: 
484: 1. **用户** — 在 `/help` 面板看到格式化输出
485: 2. **Claude Code 框架** — 解析执行指令
486: 
487: ```markdown
488: # /trae:run                          ← H1 标题 = 命令名
489: **Description:** ...                 ← 详细说明
490: **Usage:** /trae:run "任务" [options] ← 用法指南
491: **Options:**                         ← 参数列表
492: - `--background`: ...
493: **Examples:**                        ← 示例
494: /trae:run "重构用户模块"
495: **Internal Execution:**              ← 框架执行指令
496: node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" run "任务描述" [options]
497: ```
498: 
499: **Frontmatter**：
500: ```yaml
501: description: 将任务委托给 Trae Agent 执行
502: allowed-tools: Bash(trae-cli:*)
503: ```
504: 
505: ### OpenCode 命令文档
506: 
507: `.opencode/commands/trae-*.md` 仅为 **Agent 可读的参考文档**，不含 Slash Command 语法：
508: 
509: ```markdown
510: Execute the task by running the trae-plugin-cc CLI:
511: 
512: ```bash
513: node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" run $ARGUMENTS
514: ```
515: 
516: Usage examples:
517: - `task "refactor the user module"`
518: - `task "fix the login bug" --yolo`
519: ```
520: 
521: **Frontmatter** 仅有 `description:`，无 `allowed-tools`。
522: 
523: **关键差异**：
524: 
525: | 维度 | Claude Code commands/*.md | OpenCode .opencode/commands/trae-*.md |
526: |------|---------------------------|---------------------------------------|
527: | H1 标题 | `# /trae:<command>` | 无 |
528: | 格式 | 严格分段（Description/Usage/Options/Examples/Internal） | 自由段落 + 代码块 |
529: | Frontmatter | `description` + `allowed-tools` | 仅 `description` |
530: | 语言 | 中文 | 英文 |
531: | 变量占位 | 具体值（"任务描述"） | 抽象变量（`$ARGUMENTS`） |
532: | 作用 | 用户帮助 + 框架执行指令 | 仅为 Agent 提供执行参考 |
533: 
534: ---
535: 
536: ## 7. 安全模型：allowed-tools vs 无显式权限声明
537: 
538: ### Claude Code：声明式 Bash 权限
539: 
540: Claude Code 的 Slash Commands 通过 `allowed-tools` 声明所需的 Bash 工具访问权限：
541: 
542: ```markdown
543: # /trae:run
544: allowed-tools: Bash(trae-cli:*)
545: 
546: # /trae:review
547: allowed-tools: Bash(git:*), Bash(trae-cli:*)
548: 
549: # /trae:cancel
550: allowed-tools: Bash(kill)
551: ```
552: 
553: **语义**：`Bash(trae-cli:*)` 表示该命令需要 `Bash` 工具能执行包含 `trae-cli` 的命令，`*` 是通配符。
554: 
555: **未声明 `allowed-tools` 的命令**（`setup`, `status`, `result`, `sessions`）：不需要特殊 Bash 工具权限，仅运行 `node dist/index.js`。
556: 
557: **MCP 工具**不声明 `allowed-tools` — 因为 MCP 工具的执行完全由 Claude Code 的 MCP 服务器托管，不在 Bash 工具链内。
558: 
559: ### OpenCode：隐式信任
560: 
561: OpenCode 的 Plugin 代码运行在 Bun 环境内，**没有独立的权限声明系统**：
562: 
563: - `trae-setup.ts` → `Bun.spawn(["node", DIST_INDEX, "setup"])` — 无权限检查
564: - `trae-run.ts` → `Bun.$\`node dist/index.js run ...\`` — 无权限声明
565: - 所有 Bun 工具在 OpenCode Plugin 上下文中拥有完整执行权限
566: 
567: **根本原因**：Bun 工具的 `execute()` 是进程内函数调用（不是通过 Bash 工具间接执行），不存在 Claude Code 式的 "Bash 工具权限"概念。OpenCode 的权限控制粒度是 **Plugin 级别**（信任整个插件），而非**命令级别**。
568: 
569: ---
570: 
571: ## 8. 运行时与进程模型
572: 
573: ### Claude Code
574: 
575: ```
576: ┌───────────────────────────────────────────┐
577: │           Claude Code (Node.js)            │
578: │                                            │
579: │  ┌─ Slash Command 触发 ──────────────────┐ │
580: │  │ Bash Tool → spawn("node", [...])      │ │
581: │  │  → dist/index.js → spawn("trae-cli")   │ │
582: │  └───────────────────────────────────────┘ │
583: │                                            │
584: │  ┌─ MCP 工具触发 ────────────────────────┐ │
585: │  │ MCP Server → spawn("node", [...])     │ │
586: │  │  → dist/index.js → spawn("trae-cli")   │ │
587: │  └───────────────────────────────────────┘ │
588: │                                            │
589: │  ┌─ 钩子触发 ────────────────────────────┐ │
590: │  │ hooks.json → spawn("node", [...])     │ │
591: │  │  → scripts/*.mjs                       │ │
592: │  └───────────────────────────────────────┘ │
593: └───────────────────────────────────────────┘
594: ```
595: 
596: **运行时**：Node.js（根 `package.json`）
597: **进程数**：每个命令/工具/钩子 → 新的 `node` 进程 + `trae-cli` 子进程
598: 
599: ### OpenCode
600: 
601: ```
602: ┌───────────────────────────────────────────┐
603: │           OpenCode (Bun)                   │
604: │                                            │
605: │  ┌─ Bun Tool 触发 ──────────────────────┐ │
606: │  │ execute(args, context)                │ │
607: │  │  → Bun.$\`node dist/index.js ...\``   │ │
608: │  │   → dist/index.js → spawn("trae-cli") │ │
609: │  └───────────────────────────────────────┘ │
610: │                                            │
611: │  ┌─ Plugin Hook 触发 ────────────────────┐ │
612: │  │ event({ event }) → Bun.spawn(...)     │ │
613: │  │  → scripts/*.mjs                       │ │
614: │  └───────────────────────────────────────┘ │
615: └───────────────────────────────────────────┘
616: ```
617: 
618: **运行时**：Bun（`.opencode/package.json` 独立依赖树）
619: **进程数**：每个 Bun Tool 调用 → 新的 Bun 内函数执行 → `spawn("node", ...)` → `trae-cli`
620: 
621: ---
622: 
623: ## 9. 本项目的统一架构设计
624: 
625: 基于两个平台的根本差异，本项目采用 **"共享核心 + 平台适配层"** 的双层架构：
626: 
627: ### 共享核心（src/ → dist/index.js）
628: 
629: ```
630: src/
631: ├── index.ts              ← CLI 入口（argv 解析 → 命令分发）
632: ├── commands/             ← 12 个命令处理器
633: │   ├── setup.ts
634: │   ├── run.ts
635: │   ├── review.ts
636: │   ├── sessions.ts
637: │   ├── acp.ts
638: │   ├── ...
639: └── utils/                ← 共享工具类
640:     ├── trae-executor.ts       ← trae-cli 子进程执行器
641:     ├── session-reader.ts      ← 会话文件读取器
642:     ├── auth-bridge.ts         ← 认证状态解析
643:     ├── acp-server-manager.ts  ← ACP 进程管理
644:     ├── acp-client.ts          ← ACP JSON-RPC 客户端
645:     ├── branch-detection.ts    ← git 分支检测
646:     └── ...
647: ```
648: 
649: **编译**：esbuild 打包为 `dist/index.js`（单文件，含 shebang，Node externals）
650: 
651: ### Claude Code 适配层
652: 
653: ```
654: .claude-plugin/plugin.json    ← 插件 identity
655: commands/*.md                 ← 10 个 Slash Command 定义
656: .mcp.json                     ← 4 个 MCP 工具
657: hooks/hooks.json              ← 4 个生命周期钩子
658: scripts/*.mjs                 ← 钩子脚本实现
659: ```
660: 
661: **调用链**：
662: - Slash Command: 用户 → `/trae:run` → Bash Tool → `node dist/index.js run`
663: - MCP: Claude AI → MCP `trae_run` → MCP Server → `node dist/index.js run`
664: - Hooks: 事件 → hooks.json → `node scripts/*.mjs`
665: 
666: ### OpenCode 适配层
667: 
668: ```
669: .opencode/
670: ├── tools/trae-*.ts         ← 9 个 Bun 工具 (export default tool({...}))
671: ├── commands/trae-*.md      ← 10 个命令参考文档
672: ├── plugins/trae-hooks.ts   ← 事件钩子插件 (export const TraeHooksPlugin: Plugin)
673: └── package.json            ← @opencode-ai/plugin@1.14.20
674: ```
675: 
676: **调用链**：
677: - Tools: Agent → `trae-run` → `execute()` → `Bun.$\`node dist/index.js run\``
678: - Commands: Agent → 读取 `.opencode/commands/trae-run.md` → 理解 CLI 参数形式
679: - Hooks: OpenCode 事件 → `TraeHooksPlugin` → `Bun.spawn("node", [script])`
680: 
681: ### 桥接策略
682: 
683: | 问题 | 解决方式 |
684: |------|----------|
685: | MCP 4 个工具 vs 9 个 Bun 工具 | MCP 是 AI 自主调用的最小集（run/review/sessions/acp）；辅助操作（status/result/cancel/rescue/setup）只需 Slash Commands |
686: | Slash `/trae:review` + `/trae:adversarial-review` vs 1 个 `trae-review` 工具 | OpenCode 工具内部用 `adversarial` 布尔参数路由（`args.adversarial ? "adversarial-review" : "review"`） |
687: | `hooks.json` 4 个钩子 vs `trae-hooks.ts` 3 种事件 | OpenCode 无 `Stop`/`PostToolUse` 等价事件，选择性映射 |
688: | `commands/` vs `.opencode/commands/` | 两套独立文件——Claude Code 需要结构化 Markdown + slash syntax；OpenCode 需要简洁 Agent 指令 |
689: 
690: ### 参数映射（run 命令完整对照）
691: 
692: | Slash Command | MCP 工具 | Bun Tool | CLI 参数 | 说明 |
693: |---|---|---|---|---|
694: | 用户输入 `/trae:run "x"` | Agent 调用 `trae_run({prompt:"x"})` | Agent 调用 `trae-run({prompt:"x"})` | `run "x"` | 统一 |
695: | `--yolo` / `-y` | `yolo: true` | `yolo: true` | `--yolo` | 统一 |
696: | `--resume` | `resume: "AUTO"` | `resume: "AUTO"` | `--resume AUTO` | 统一 |
697: | `--resume <id>` | `resume: "<id>"` | `resume: "<id>"` | `--resume <id>` | 统一 |
698: | `--worktree` | `worktree: "__auto__"` | `worktree: "__auto__"` | `--worktree __auto__` | 统一 |
699: | 无 | `json_output: true` | `json_output: true` | `--json` | snake_case 差异 |
700: | 无 | `allowed_tools: ["Bash"]` | `allowed_tools: ["Bash"]` | `--allowed-tool Bash` | snake_case + array |
701: | 无 | `disallowed_tools: ["Edit"]` | `disallowed_tools: ["Edit"]` | `--disallowed-tool Edit` | snake_case + array |
702: 
703: **MCP/Bun** 使用 `snake_case`（`json_output`, `allowed_tools`），Slash Command CLI 使用 `kebab-case`（`--json`, `--allowed-tool`）。Bun 工具的 `execute()` 负责转换映射。
704: 
705: ---
706: 
707: ## 10. 完整对比矩阵
708: 
709: | 维度 | Claude Code | OpenCode | 本项目处理策略 |
710: |------|-------------|----------|---------------|
711: | **运行时** | Node.js | Bun | 共享 CLI 用 Node.js（esbuild），OpenCode 工具用 Bun |
712: | **插件入口** | `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` | TypeScript `export const X: Plugin` | 两份独立配置 |
713: | **用户命令** | 10 个 Slash Commands (`/trae:xxx`) | 无独立 Slash Command，工具在 `/` 面板统一展示 | `commands/*.md` 定义 slash 命令；`.opencode/tools/` 定义工具 |
714: | **AI 工具** | 4 个 MCP 工具（JSON Schema） | 9 个 Bun 工具（Zod + TS） | MCP 定义最小 AI 工具集；Bun 工具覆盖全部 CLI 命令 |
715: | **工具注册** | `.mcp.json` 声明式 | `export default tool({...})` 命令式 | 两套独立定义，参数一致 |
716: | **生命周期** | `hooks/hooks.json` (4 个) | `plugins/trae-hooks.ts` (事件映射) | 复用同一批 `.mjs` 脚本，OpenCode 通过 `Bun.spawn` 触发 |
717: | **命令文档** | `commands/*.md` (含 slash 语法) | `.opencode/commands/*.md` (Agent 参考) | 两套独立文件 |
718: | **权限模型** | `allowed-tools` frontmatter | 无（Plugin 级信任） | Slash Commands 声明 `allowed-tools`；Bun 工具不需要 |
719: | **进程模型** | CLI 每调用启动新 `node` 进程 | Bun Tool 进程内调用 → 再 `spawn` `node` | 统一使用 `dist/index.js`（esbuild 单文件） |
720: | **类型安全** | 无（JSON + Markdown） | 完整（TypeScript + Zod） | 共享核心 `src/commands/` 自行解析 argv（无类型框架） |
721: | **工具合并** | `review` + `adversarial-review` (两个独立命令) | `trae-review` (一个工具，`adversarial` 布尔参数) | Bun 工具内部路由到两个 CLI 命令 |
722: | **依赖管理** | 根 `package.json` | `.opencode/package.json` | 两套独立 `package.json` |
723: | **Marketplace** | git URL + `claude plugin install` | 无 marketplace，本地发现 | 支持 Marketplace 安装 + 本地目录安装 |

(End of file - total 723 lines)
</content>

---

## 2. package.json

**Path:** `/Users/ubuntu/1-project/idea0015-trae-plugin-cc/package.json`

- **Name:** `trae-plugin-cc`, version `1.0.0`
- **Description:** Bridges Claude Code and OpenCode with ByteDance Trae Agent (`trae-cli`)
- **Main entry:** `dist/index.js`
- **Bin:** `trae-plugin-cc` -> `dist/index.js`
- **Scripts:**
  - `build`: esbuild bundles `src/index.ts` into `dist/index.js` with shebang, external Node modules
  - `build:tsc`: tsc only (rarely needed)
  - `postinstall`: auto-triggers `npm run build`
  - `test`: runs jest
- **Dependencies:** `js-yaml` only
- **DevDependencies:** `@types/jest`, `@types/js-yaml`, `@types/node`, `esbuild`, `jest`, `ts-jest`, `typescript`
- **Repository:** github.com/wangxumarshall/idea0015-trae-plugin-cc
- **License:** MIT

---

## 3. ALL TYPESCRIPT SOURCE FILES IN src/

### 3.1 Entry Point: `src/index.ts`
- **Role:** Single CLI entrypoint. Parses `process.argv[2]` and dispatches to command handlers.
- **Commands handled:** `setup`, `review`, `adversarial-review`, `run`, `status`, `result`, `cancel`, `hooks`, `rescue`, `sessions`, `acp`
- **Error handling:** Catches all errors and logs via `getErrorMessage()`

### 3.2 Config: `src/config.ts`
- **Constants:** `PLUGIN_DIR_NAME = '.claude-trae-plugin'`
- **Functions:** `getPluginDir()` (cwd-relative), `getCliCacheDirs()` (macOS/Linux paths), `getTraeCliConfigPath()` (~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml)

### 3.3 Utils Barrel: `src/utils.ts`
- Re-exports all utility classes: `SessionReader`, `AuthBridge`, `ContextBridge`, `TraeExecutor`, `AcpClient`, `AcpServerManager`
- Provides `isTraeCliInstalled()` (via `which trae-cli`) and `getGitDiff(baseBranch)` (with fallback to unstaged)
- Provides `ensurePluginDir()`

### 3.4 Commands

#### `src/commands/setup.ts` (51 lines)
Checks trae-cli installation + auth status via `AuthBridge`. Displays model, login URL, allowed tools, and plugins.

#### `src/commands/run.ts` (117 lines)
Parses CLI args for task execution: `--background`, `--json`, `--yolo`, `--resume`, `--session-id`, `--worktree`, `--allowed-tool`, `--disallowed-tool`, `--query-timeout`, `--bash-tool-timeout`, `-c`, `--inject-context`. Delegates to `TraeExecutor.execute()`.

#### `src/commands/review.ts` (84 lines)
Gets git diff, auto-detects base branch, estimates review size (and auto-enables background for large diffs), then submits to TraeExecutor. Supports `--base`, `--background`, `--yolo`, `--json`, `--session-id`.

#### `src/commands/sessions.ts` (309 lines)
9 actions: `list`, `detail`, `conversation`, `tools`, `context`, `recent`, `find`, `delete`, `delete-smoke`. Reads trae-cli's on-disk session cache directly.

#### `src/commands/acp.ts` (228 lines)
6 actions: `start`, `stop`, `status`, `agents`, `run`, `stream`. Uses `AcpServerManager` to spawn `trae-cli acp serve`, then `AcpClient` for JSON-RPC over STDIO.

#### `src/commands/jobs.ts` (100 lines)
Background job management: `getJobs()` (reads .pid files, checks process liveness), `status()`, `result()` (reads .log files), `cancel()` (SIGKILL).

#### `src/commands/rescue.ts` (110 lines)
Collects last error log, git status, recent commits, then submits diagnostic prompt to `TraeExecutor` for AI analysis.

#### `src/commands/hooks.ts` (46 lines)
Routes internal hook invocations (`session-start`, `session-end`, `stop-gate`) to corresponding `.mjs` scripts in `scripts/`.

### 3.5 Utilities

#### `src/utils/trae-executor.ts` (217 lines)
Core execution engine. `TraeExecutor.execute()` spawns `trae-cli` as child process. Supports foreground (with 5-min timeout, stdout/stderr capture, JSON parsing) and background (detached, PID file tracking, log file writing) modes. Builds CLI args from `TraeTaskConfig`.

#### `src/utils/session-reader.ts` (306 lines)
Reads trae-cli's on-disk session data from `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` or `~/.cache/trae_cli/sessions/`. Methods: `listSessions()`, `getSession()`, `getEvents()`, `getConversation()`, `getToolCalls()`, `getFileTrackStatus()`, `getRecentSession()`, `findSessionByTopic()`, `getContextSummary()`, `getHistory()`, `deleteSession()`.

#### `src/utils/auth-bridge.ts` (88 lines)
Reads and parses `~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml` (YAML). Provides: `loadConfig()`, `checkAuthStatus()`, `getLoginBaseUrl()`, `getModelName()`, `getAllowedTools()`, `getPlugins()`, `buildSpawnEnv()`.

#### `src/utils/context-bridge.ts` (99 lines)
Builds context from prior sessions for injection. Methods: `buildResumedPrompt()`, `findSessionByCwd()`, `findSessionByTopic()`, `buildContextFromSession()`, `injectContextToPrompt()`.

#### `src/utils/acp-client.ts` (216 lines)
JSON-RPC 2.0 client over STDIO. Manages message ID counter, pending request map with 60s timeouts, update callbacks. Methods: `initialize()`, `createSession()`, `loadSession()`, `sessionPrompt()`, `sessionCancel()`, `getSessionId()`. Parses newline-delimited JSON from stdout.

#### `src/utils/acp-server-manager.ts` (171 lines)
Manages `trae-cli acp serve` child process lifecycle. Uses pipe STDIO. Has 10s startup timeout with diagnostic tracing. Methods: `start()`, `stop()` (SIGTERM then SIGKILL after 3s grace), `isRunning()`, `getClient()`, `getStatus()`.

#### `src/utils/branch-detection.ts` (188 lines)
Git utilities: `detectBaseBranch()` (checks upstream/remote/fallback), `getUntrackedFiles()`, `estimateReviewSize()` (lines added/deleted, files changed, time estimate), `formatEstimate()` (human-readable output).

#### `src/utils/env.ts` (21 lines)
`buildSpawnEnv()` prepends `~/.local/bin` to PATH and forwards `TRAECLI_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN`. `isInPath()` checks if a directory is already in PATH.

### 3.6 Types

#### `src/types/errors.ts` (39 lines)
Custom error classes: `TraeCliError`, `AuthError`, `ExecutionError`, `SessionNotFoundError`. Utility: `isError()`, `getErrorMessage()`.

---

## 4. ALL TEST FILES IN tests/

| File | Lines | Coverage |
|------|-------|----------|
| `tests/utils.test.ts` | 96 | `isTraeCliInstalled` (success/failure), `getGitDiff` (base branch, fallback, non-git-repo), exports verification |
| `tests/utils/env.test.ts` | 58 | `buildSpawnEnv` (PATH prepend, no-duplicate, empty PATH, token forwarding), `isInPath` |
| `tests/utils/auth-bridge.test.ts` | 77 | `loadConfig` (missing file, valid YAML, parse error), getters (login URL, model, tools, plugins), caching |
| `tests/utils/trae-executor.test.ts` | 182 | Foreground: prompt+--print, --yolo, --json, --resume, --worktree, allowed/disallowed tools, child process error. Background: detached spawn |
| `tests/commands/setup.test.ts` | 41 | Installed success, not-installed instructions |
| `tests/commands/review.test.ts` | 94 | No diff early return, --base flag skip, auto-detect, auto-enable background for large changes, size estimation |
| `tests/commands/jobs.test.ts` | 132 | getJobs (empty, running/stopped verification), status (empty, populated), result (no ID, file not found, read content), cancel (no ID, no PID file, SIGKILL+unlink) |

**Test framework:** Jest + ts-jest, `testEnvironment: "node"`. All tests mock `child_process`, `fs`, and relevant modules. ~12s execution time.

---

## 5. COMMAND MARKDOWN FILES IN commands/

All in `/Users/ubuntu/1-project/idea0015-trae-plugin-cc/commands/`:

| File | Purpose | Internal Execution |
|------|---------|-------------------|
| `run.md` | Task delegation with all options | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" run "任务描述" [options]` |
| `review.md` | Standard code review | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" review [options]` |
| `adversarial-review.md` | Strict adversarial review | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" adversarial-review [options]` |
| `setup.md` | Initialize/check trae-cli | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" setup` |
| `sessions.md` | 9 session management actions | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" sessions <action>` |
| `acp.md` | 6 ACP protocol actions | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" acp <action>` |
| `status.md` | Background task listing | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" status` |
| `result.md` | Read job log output | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" result <Task ID>` |
| `cancel.md` | Force-kill background task | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" cancel <Task ID>` |
| `rescue.md` | Failure diagnosis | `node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" rescue [--context text]` |

Each has YAML frontmatter with `description:` and `allowed-tools:` (for git/trae-cli/kill access).

---

## 6. MCP CONFIG (.mcp.json)

**Path:** `/Users/ubuntu/1-project/idea0015-trae-plugin-cc/.mcp.json`

4 MCP tools defined with JSON Schema parameters:
1. **`trae_run`** - Execute tasks (prompt required; optional: resume, session_id, yolo, allowed_tools, disallowed_tools, json_output, background, worktree, query_timeout, bash_tool_timeout, inject_context)
2. **`trae_review`** - Code review (optional: base_branch, adversarial, background, yolo, json_output, session_id)
3. **`trae_sessions`** - Session management (action enum: list/detail/conversation/tools/context/recent/find/delete; optional: session_id, cwd, limit, topic)
4. **`trae_acp`** - ACP protocol (action enum: start/stop/status/agents/run/stream; optional: prompt, yolo, allowed_tools, disabled_tools)

---

## 7. HOOKS (hooks/hooks.json)

**Path:** `/Users/ubuntu/1-project/idea0015-trae-plugin-cc/hooks/hooks.json`

4 lifecycle hooks:
- **SessionStart** (matcher: "startup") -> `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs SessionStart` (timeout: 10s)
- **SessionEnd** -> `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs SessionEnd` (timeout: 10s)
- **Stop** -> `stop-review-gate-hook.mjs` (timeout: 60s)
- **PostToolUse** (matcher: regex `.*trae:review.*`) -> `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs PostReview` (timeout: 5s)

All use `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` variable substitution.

---

## 8. SCRIPTS IN scripts/

| File | Lines | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` | 154 | Handles SessionStart (check trae-cli, remind running jobs), SessionEnd (cleanup stale 7-day logs, remind running tasks), PostReview (append to reviews.jsonl) |
| `stop-review-gate-hook.mjs` | 61 | Checks for uncommitted git changes + running jobs. Exits with code 1 to block session stop. `--force` bypasses. |
| `job-utils.mjs` | 41 | Shared utilities: `getPluginDir()`, `getRunningJobs()` (reads .pid files, `process.kill(pid, 0)` check), `isJobRunning()` |
| `trae-companion.mjs` | 131 | Alternate unified CLI entry point with JSON output mode (`--json`). Handles setup, estimate, status directly; delegates other commands to dist/index.js |

---

## 9. ALL OPENCODE TOOLS IN .opencode/tools/

All spawn `node dist/index.js` from the plugin root directory.

| Tool | Lines | Maps to CLI | Args |
|------|-------|-------------|------|
| `trae-setup.ts` | 19 | `setup` | None |
| `trae-run.ts` | 71 | `run` | prompt, resume, session_id, yolo, allowed_tools, disallowed_tools, json_output, background, worktree, query_timeout, bash_tool_timeout, inject_context |
| `trae-review.ts` | 43 | `review` or `adversarial-review` (based on `adversarial` boolean) | base_branch, adversarial, background, yolo, json_output, session_id |
| `trae-sessions.ts` | 55 | `sessions` | action (9 enums), session_id, cwd, limit, topic |
| `trae-acp.ts` | 45 | `acp` | action (6 enums), prompt, yolo, allowed_tools, disabled_tools |
| `trae-status.ts` | 19 | `status` | None |
| `trae-result.ts` | 22 | `result` | task_id (required) |
| `trae-cancel.ts` | 22 | `cancel` | task_id (required) |
| `trae-rescue.ts` | 26 | `rescue` | context (optional) |

All use `@opencode-ai/plugin` SDK with `tool()` factory and Zod schemas for argument validation.

---

## 10. ALL OPENCODE COMMANDS IN .opencode/commands/

10 markdown files with YAML frontmatter (`description:` only). English language. Serve as agent-readable reference for CLI argument formats.

| File | Maps to |
|------|---------|
| `trae-run.md` | `run` command with examples |
| `trae-review.md` | `review` with options |
| `trae-adversarial-review.md` | `adversarial-review` with options |
| `trae-setup.md` | `setup` verification |
| `trae-sessions.md` | `sessions` with 8 actions |
| `trae-acp.md` | `acp` with 6 actions |
| `trae-status.md` | `status` display |
| `trae-result.md` | `result` with task ID |
| `trae-cancel.md` | `cancel` with task ID |
| `trae-rescue.md` | `rescue` with context option |

---

## 11. ALL OPENCODE PLUGINS IN .opencode/plugins/

| File | Lines | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `trae-hooks.ts` | 108 | Maps OpenCode events to trae lifecycle hooks. `session.created` -> SessionStart (async), `session.deleted` -> SessionEnd (sync), `server.instance.disposed` -> SessionEnd (sync, fallback). Uses `Bun.spawn`/`Bun.spawnSync` to call the same `.mjs` scripts. JSON payloads via stdin. State tracked via `currentSessionID` closure variable. Failures silently caught. |
| `entire.ts` | 177 | Auto-generated by `entire enable --agent opencode`. Separate plugin for "Entire" CLI lifecycle logging. Covers session.created, message.updated, message.part.updated (turn-start), session.status (turn-end), session.compacted, session.deleted, server.instance.disposed. Not part of trae-plugin-cc core functionality. |

## ADDITIONAL CONFIGURATION FILES

### `docs/platform-architectures.md` (723 lines)
- Comprehensive dual-platform architecture comparison document covering: platform differences, plugin discovery, commands (Slash vs Bun Tools), tool protocols (MCP vs Zod), lifecycle hooks (hooks.json vs Plugin Events), command docs, security model, runtime/process models, unified architecture design, parameter mapping, and full comparison matrix.
